RQ2_1.approach: Direct SQL query with UNION ALL for 'All' option
Fetch genres first, then prepend 'All' using list concatenation
Fetch genres, insert 'All' at index 0 using list insert
Use context manager for connection, fetch all, then prepend

Two separate queries for 'All' and specific genre, with IFNULL
Use parameterized query with placeholder for genre, handle 'All' with WHERE 1=1

Whitelist with set membership and tuple unpacking
